name: pnp-sp-dev-spfx-web-parts-react-hot-desk-booking
title: React Hot Desk Booking Web Part
shortDescription: This SharePoint Framework (SPFx) web part enables organizations to efficiently manage shared resource bookings, such as hot desks, parking spots, and lockers. Users can browse available resources, make instant bookings for specific dates, view their existing bookings, and cancel reservations when needed.
longDescription: This SharePoint Framework (SPFx) web part enables organizations to efficiently manage shared resource bookings, such as hot desks, parking spots, and lockers. Users can browse available resources, make instant bookings for specific dates, view their existing bookings, and cancel reservations when needed.

references.name: Build your first SharePoint client-side web part
references.description: Client-side web parts are client-side components that run in the context of a SharePoint page. Client-side web parts can be deployed to SharePoint environments that support the SharePoint Framework. You can also use modern JavaScript web frameworks, tools, and libraries to build them.
